badges.loopExplorer: Loop Explorer — complete 3 levels using loops
badges.conditionalThinker: Conditional Thinker — complete a level using an if-block

progress.title: Your Progress
progress.noActivity: No levels completed yet — go earn your first star!

dailyChallengeNote: Daily Challenge remixes levels you've already learned with new numbers — it's practice, not new lessons.

sync.title: Play on Another Device
sync.desc: Turn this on to get a code you can type into a phone or tablet — it brings this profile's progress along.
sync.linked: Synced! This profile can play on other devices.
sync.codeHint: Type this code into "Link a device" on the other device.
sync.error: Couldn't reach the sync server — try again in a bit.
